entities.name: GXE INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genotype and environment that affects grain yield, particularly high in the semi-arid tropics

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural trait used to identify high-yielding genotypes in multi-environment trials

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where GxE interaction for grain yield is generally high due to variable conditions

entities.name: CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Unreliable and highly variable weather factors that contribute to GxE interaction

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Biological agents that influence the GxE interaction for grain yield

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological states that influence the GxE interaction for grain yield

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL MULTI-ENVIRONMENT TRIALS
entities.description: A trial system used to identify and distribute high-yielding genotypes and link ICRISAT with NARS scientists

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the organizing body for IMETs

entities.name: NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH SYSTEM
entities.description: The network of national scientists who collaborate with ICRISAT through IMETs

entities.name: LINEAR REGRESSION ANALYSES
entities.description: Statistical methods used in IMETs that favor the identification of material with high response to agricultural inputs

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INPUTS
entities.description: External resources provided to crops that influence the response of genetic material

entities.name: ZONES OF ADAPTATION
entities.description: Defined geographic areas where specific genotypes are identified to have high grain yield

entities.name: SEED DISSEMINATION
entities.description: The process of distributing seeds, which is a primary objective of screening nurseries in IMETs

entities.name: SCREENING NURSERY
entities.description: A specific type of IMET used for seed dissemination and identifying desirable plant traits

entities.name: YIELD TRIAL
entities.description: A strategic type of IMET aimed at describing plant responses to environmental conditions

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The external factors to which plant responses are measured in yield trials

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of genetic material to perform in either broad or specific environments
